title: 4 Towers and a funeral
description: Build a tower in all the exact 4 corners of the map, delete your civ's highest value unit (total resource amount excluding docks) and win

title: A Barrel of Scorpions
description: Win with 20+ Scorpions/Heavy Scorpions alive at time of victory

title: The Scorpion King
description: Produce only scorpions (must make at least 2) and villagers and win

title: A Clean Victory
description: Win with 30+ Genitours/Elite Genitours alive at time of victory

title: A Real All In
description: Delete your starting TC in Castle age + win. No Cumans and no additional TCs allowed.

title: A Towering Achievement
description: Win with 10 Siege towers alive at time of victory

title: A Wooden Economy
description: After reaching Feudal Age villagers may only gather wood, and win

title: Actual Gatekeeping
description: Every military unit must pass through the same gate (it may be rebuilt on the same tiles if lost) and win

title: An Explosive Victory
description: Win producing only villagers and 2 or more petards and/or 2 or more flaming camels

title: And My Axe
description: Make only Throwing Axemen/Elite Throwing Axemen (must make at least 2) and villagers + win

title: Andean Revolution
description: As Incas, build a maximum of one tower before reaching Castle Age; you may not produce anything but villagers and win.

title: Archers Suck 3
description: Win as Spanish or Bulgarians with 60 foot archers alive at time of victory

title: Basically a Trebuchet
description: Kill 5 military production buildings or 1 castle or 1 TC with only villagers and win

title: Basically the Huns
description: You must not reach Feudal Age until you reach 200 pop in housing and win (no Huns)

title: Tree-hugger
description: Win a game without building a lumbercamp (lumber camp civs only)

title: Traitor Trading 2
description: Trade with enemy for a total of 500+ gold and win

title: The Dumbest Wall
description: Build a wall (any impassable construction) that touches both starting TCs and win

title: Build It Nice Build It Twice
description: All buildings must be built touching in pairs + win

title: Buildings Are Stupid
description: Win without any buildings alive at time of victory

title: Cantankerous Clergy
description: Produce only warrior priests (must make at least 2) and villagers and win

title: Centers of Attention 3
description: Win with 30 TCs alive or more at time of victory

title: Custom Renovations
description: Replace 5 enemy buildings with your own + win

title: EEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEEagles
description: Kill a TC in Feudal age using only Eagles and win

title: F It, Make War Elephants
description: Produce only war elephants (must make at least 2) and villagers and win

title: Feudal Flemish Fisticuffs
description: Produce only Flemish militia, remain in Feudal Age and win

title: Feudalsphoru
description: Make no villagers once reaching Feudal Age and win

title: Float Like a Butterfly
description: Wall in an opponent's villager, win a 1v1 fight after the walls are up; your vill must be alive at time of victory and win

title: Garbage Garbage
description: Produce only spears, skirms, siege units and villagers as the Turks and win

title: Ghost Town
description: Delete your starting TC and rebuild it on a neutral gold/stone before Feudal and win

title: Greg The Builder
description: All buildings other than farms must be built using the same villager and win

title: Heroic Entrance
description: Produce a Hero as your first military unit and win

title: His Name's Greg
description: Entirely construct at least 1 castle with 1 villager named Greg (who survives) within line of sight of the opponent and win

title: Housing Crisis
description: Produce no more than 15 villagers and win

title: I Draw The Line
description: Win with a completed wall (walls and gates only) that touches parallel outsides of the map

title: Inclined To Build
description: Houses may only be placed on hills or elevations and win (no Huns)

title: Inefficient Construction
description: All resource camps must be built touching the wrong resource + win

title: Jam Your BBC In Their Base
description: Win using only vils and BBC (must make at least 2 BBC), no Burgundians

title: Jeff's Strategy
description: Collect at least 1 stone from every stone pile on the map and win

title: Killager
description: Kill 3 of the opponent's units with one of your starting villagers and win

title: Kiss Me, I'm 15 Mangonels
description: Have 15 Mangonels alive simultaneously at any point + win

title: Long Live The Warrior King 3
description: Kill 6 of the opponent's units with your starting scout, keep it alive + win

title: Lubov's Discount Day 2
description: Produce at least 40 militia in dark age and win

title: Militaristic Society 2: Electric Boogaloo
description: Win without any villagers alive at time of victory (No Burgundians)

title: My Humps My Humps My Humps
description: Produce only camel scouts and villagers and win

title: No Khmercy 2
description: Produce only Ballista Elephants and villagers and win

title: No Touching
description: No structures of any kind (excluding farms) are allowed to touch + win

title: NonAgrarian Society
description: Do not make any farm until imperial age and win

title: OK Boomer
description: No clicking up to castle age until 100 villagers are alive and win

title: Only Rams
description: Produce only rams and villagers and win

title: Poor City Planning
description: All buildings must connect to your starting Town Center, directly or through other completed connected buildings, and win

title: Public Transportation
description: Do a lap around the entire edge of the map with a garrisoned ram, leave one unit in each corner and win

title: Quartering Troops
description: All new houses must connect directly to a military building after 6 villagers and win (no huns)

title: Quit Milling About!
description: The first two buildings constructed must be mills (no huns or japanese) and win

title: Quit touching me
description: Build a castle that touches an opponents finished Castle and win

title: Religious Generosity
description: Drop at least 3 relics within LOS of your opponent's starting TC + win

title: Rocket the Kasbah
description: Produce only Rocket Carts and villagers and win

title: Santa's Reindeer
description: Collect 4 deer (or all your chickens) in a single pen (they must survive) and win

title: Spelling Rocks
description: Legibly spell your opponent's name (or grathwrang) in stone walls and win

title: Stop Hitting Yourself 2
description: Kill at least 50 of your own units and win (deleting units does not count)

title: Teutonic Scouting 3
description: Have 60 scouts alive at time of victory as Teutons

title: The Cautious Shepherd
description: Build a stone pen for your sheep, they all must survive in the pen + win

title: The Ents
description: Produce only Trebuchets and villagers and win

title: The Friendly Stranger
description: Build a farm in visual range of the opponent, fully farm the farm and win

title: The Great Caper
description: Have 75 Teuton unique units alive at any time and win

title: The Hunt is On
description: Kill 4 wolves with 1 villager, it must survive, and win (no Magyars)

title: The One Ring
description: Select a villager named "Frodo" to touch an enemy's TC (any) and survive and win

title: The Stone Hydra
description: Place 3 touching castle foundations simultaneously, complete the castles, keep them alive + win

title: This is Fine
description: At least 6 of your buildings must be on fire and win

title: Trappers
description: Wall at least 3 wolf type animals in, you must not kill them + win

title: Vegan Living
description: Don't kill any creature (not including the opponent's units) and win (no Khmer, no Gurjaras)

title: Wallflower
description: All buildings must be on the outside edges of the map and win

title: We Have Huns at Home
description: Do not produce any military until reaching 200 pop space and win (no huns)

title: Wonderful Aggression
description: Build a wonder in line of sight of the opponent and win

title: Wonderwall
description: Win with a completed wall around your starting TC that includes a wonder

title: Wooden Allergy
description: Win without gathering wood

title: Scorpi-on-a-TC
description: Kill a TC using only scorpions and win

title: Traitor Trading
description: Trade with enemy for any amount of gold and win

title: Lazy Construction
description: Entirely construct at least 1 castle with 1 villager and win

title: This is Fine 2
description: At least 12 of your buildings must be on fire and win

title: This is Fine 3
description: All of your constructions must be on fire and win

title: Scorpi-on-a-Castle
description: Kill a castle using only scorpions and win

title: Traitor Trading 3
description: Trade with the enemy for a total of 1000+ gold and win

title: Long Live The Warrior King
description: Kill 2 of the opponent's units with your starting scout, keep it alive + win

title: Long Live The Warrior King 2
description: Kill 3 of the opponent's units with your starting scout, keep it alive + win

title: Centers of Attention
description: Win with 10 TCs alive or more at time of victory

title: Centers of Attention 2
description: Win with 20 TCs alive or more at time of victory

title: Stop Hitting Yourself 3
description: Kill at least 100 of your own units and win (deleting units does not count)

title: Stop Hitting Yourself
description: Kill at least 25 of your own units and win (deleting units does not count)

title: His Name's Greg 2
description: Entirely construct at least 2 castles with 1 villager named Greg (who survives) within line of sight of the opponent and win

title: Archers Suck 2
description: Win as Spanish or Bulgarians with 40 foot archers alive at time of victory

title: Archers Suck
description: Win as Spanish or Bulgarians with 20 foot archers alive at time of victory

title: A Towering Achievement 2
description: Win with 20 Siege towers alive at time of victory

title: A Towering Achievement 3
description: Win with 40 Siege towers alive at time of victory

title: Kiss Me, I'm 30 Mangonels
description: Have 30 Mangonels alive simultaneously at any point + win

title: Kiss Me, I'm 60 Mangonels
description: Have 60 Mangonels alive simultaneously at any point + win

title: Lubov's Discount Day 3
description: Produce at least 75 militia in dark age and win

title: Lubov's Discount Day
description: Produce at least 20 militia in dark age and win

title: Wonderful Victory
description: Begin construction on a wonder (you may not delete it) and win

title: Teutonic Scouting
description: Have 20 scouts alive at time of victory as Teutons

title: Teutonic Scouting 2
description: Have 40 scouts alive at time of victory as Teutons

title: A Barrel of Scorpions 2
description: Win with 40+ Scorpions/Heavy Scorpions alive at time of victory

title: A Barrel of Scorpions 3
description: Win with 60+ Scorpions/Heavy Scorpions alive at time of victory
